items.1: Organizational development & implementation from one source

Impact.title: What we achieve
Impact.subtitle: We strengthen your organization where people, culture and strategy converge.
Impact.clarityNote: Unclear starting points rarely lead to good decisions. In such cases, we first align direction at executive level before moving into operational steps.

items.3: Professionalize structures, processes and HR systems

Services.title: Services for CEOs, Executive Teams and Boards

0.title: Fractional CHRO / Strategic People Partner
0.description: External HR leadership role for executive teams and boards:

features.0: Relieves and advises the executive team on people and organizational matters
features.3: Ensures full compliance with employment law

1.title: Organization & Transformation
1.description: We create clarity in organization, roles, processes and execution.

features.2: Policies, regulations and legally compliant implementation
features.3: HR digitalization, HRIS, People Analytics and pragmatic AI applications

2.title: Executive Advisory & Sparring
2.description: 1:1 sparring for executive teams and leaders on leadership, organization, management and communication. Focus: clear decisions, prioritization, role clarity and confident handling of challenging situations.

features.0: Role transitions and new expectations (leadership, stakeholders, responsibility)
features.1: Leading change: alignment, implementation, handling resistance
features.2: Difficult conversations and conflict resolution (clear, de-escalating, effective)
features.3: Performance & leadership: goals, delegation, feedback, routines
features.4: Team and cross-functional leadership: accountability, collaboration, performance

3.title: Add-on: Employee Care Line
3.description:
The Employee Care Line is a confidential support service for employees within the organization. It serves as a neutral point of contact for orientation and relief and is provided by TaVyro. No individual cases are reported back to the company; feedback is provided exclusively in anonymized and aggregated form.

Even as a standalone offering, the Employee Care Line creates impact because employees receive a discreet, professional space for conversation – as a signal of appreciation, psychological safety and active care.

Services.fractionalChroLandingTeaser: If you need senior HR leadership without a full-time CHRO, see how TaVyro supports SMEs as a <link>Fractional CHRO in Zurich and across Switzerland</link>.

Pricing.title: Plans
Pricing.subtitle: All models include clear collaboration, confidentiality and predictable monthly costs.

features.0: 1:1 executive sparring + participation in selected board meetings
features.1: Prioritization & management of key HR topics

features.0: Near CHRO replacement (fair-use, up to 4 days/month)

Pricing.onboardingDesc: HR Health Check incl. prioritized action plan.
Pricing.hourlyDesc: For clearly defined projects, collaboration on an hourly basis is possible. The prerequisite is a defined scope (goal, result, timeframe). Effort and impact remain transparent; decisions are prepared on a fact-based basis.

About.title: About TaVyro
About.description: TaVyro is a boutique advisory based in Zurich for CEOs, executive teams and boards. The focus is on leadership, organization and HR governance as well as the pragmatic development of people and HR structures – from assessment through prioritization to implementation in clear, effective steps.
About.leadAdvisor: Lead Advisor: Tam Nguyen with over 20 years of experience as CHRO and HR executive in international and Swiss companies.
About.accountabilityBlock: TaVyro takes responsibility at executive team level. When needed, we selectively bring in senior experts; overall accountability remains with TaVyro. We focus on pragmatic solutions for leadership and organization; digital and AI-based approaches are used where they create real value.

qualifications.2: CAS Digitalization & Artificial Intelligence in HRM

About.fractionalChroLandingTeaser: For scope, typical situations and how mandates work, read the <link>dedicated Fractional CHRO Zurich page</link>.

0.quote: The 1:1 sparring at executive level was discreet, professional and very helpful. I was able to reassess the situation and make key decisions with significantly more clarity.
0.author: CEO, Swiss Engineering Company (China)

1.quote: In a challenging situation, I quickly received a clear assessment and a structured approach. Discreet, competent and solution-oriented – I was able to achieve a fair and sustainable solution.
1.author: Executive Private Client, Zurich

2.quote: As CHRO, he was a highly valued member of the executive team. With sensitivity, empathy and clear judgment, he noticeably advanced the company. The combination of strategic thinking and pragmatic implementation measurably contributed to stability and growth.
2.author: CEO, International Swiss SME

3.quote: In restructuring our organization, his support was a real asset. He sharpened organizational development as well as role and structure questions, properly assessed employment law topics and pragmatically guided the implementation. As a discreet sparring partner for the executive team, he brought clarity to complex situations – and helped implement decisions consistently and fairly.
3.author: Executive Team and Supervisory Board

4.quote: TaVyro quickly brought structure to leadership and role questions and noticeably improved decision quality. Particularly valuable was the combination of strategic vision (People & Organization) and consistent implementation – clearly prioritized, without overhead, with high reliability.
4.author: CEO, Swiss IT/Software Company

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Let's clarify in a brief initial meeting where the greatest leverage lies.

0.question: Why is it important to take action now?
0.answer: Because sustainable progress takes time. The biggest costs rarely lie in the project budget, but in lost time, uncertainty and delayed decisions. Changes in leadership, organization and culture don't take effect immediately – they need to be built and anchored. Those who wait too long not only lose momentum but jeopardize the long-term development capability and thus the future viability of the organization.

1.question: Does TaVyro work on an hourly basis or with retainers?
1.answer: Both. For clearly defined projects, project-based collaboration on an hourly basis is possible. For sustainable impact, prioritization and implementation, TaVyro typically works with clearly defined projects or retainers. Even though TaVyro is an externally mandated partner, TaVyro integrates into the organization and becomes effective in day-to-day operations like part of the company, understands and carries the corporate culture, while remaining neutral and objective.

2.question: What does Executive Advisory & Sparring at TaVyro include?
2.answer: Executive Advisory & Sparring at TaVyro is 1:1 sparring for CEO, executive and leadership level. The focus is on clear decisions, prioritization, role clarity, communication and handling challenging situations (e.g. conflicts, role transitions, change).

3.question: In which situations is TaVyro typically engaged?
3.answer: When decisions need to be made, roles and responsibilities need to be clarified, or leadership, organization and HR need to be strategically developed – especially in growth, change or transition phases.

4.question: How does TaVyro ensure confidentiality?
4.answer: Confidentiality is paramount. Upon request, a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) is concluded. Contents from mandates and conversations are not shared; feedback to companies – if agreed – is provided exclusively in anonymized and aggregated form.

5.question: Can the Employee Care Line also be used as a standalone offering?
5.answer: Yes. Even as a standalone offering, it creates impact because employees receive a discreet point of contact and appreciation, psychological safety and care become tangible.

6.question: What distinguishes TaVyro from large consulting firms?
6.answer: TaVyro works consistently aligned with your goals and context rather than following a standard playbook. Many consulting models are team and process-driven. Senior partners are involved on a point-by-point basis, with operational work often done by roles of varying seniority. With TaVyro, you get a constant contact person at C-level from diagnosis to implementation. Through structured onboarding, TaVyro becomes part of your organization, understands employees, culture, dynamics and decision paths, while remaining external, neutral and effective. The result is tailored solutions that are not only designed but consistently implemented.

7.question: What does TaVyro stand for at its core?
7.answer: TaVyro stands for heart, vision and anchoring. Progress happens where people are brought along, goals are clear and changes have time to take root in the organization. This very connection of attitude, direction and impact forms the foundation of sustainable business development.

8.question: What does Fractional CHRO mean?
8.answer: A Fractional CHRO is a strategic HR leadership function on a mandate or part-time basis. Companies gain CHRO competence at C-level without filling a full-time position. A Fractional CHRO works closely with the executive team, takes responsibility for people and organizational topics and strengthens structure, decision quality and implementation power, while remaining external and independent. TaVyro integrates into your organization, understands culture, employees, dynamics and decision paths and implements effective solutions together with you. This approach is often also understood as CHRO as a Service, external HR leadership or strategic HR consulting for the executive team.

9.question: How much does a Fractional CHRO cost in Switzerland?
9.answer: Pricing depends on scope, duration and complexity. TaVyro works with clear models and transparent service boundaries to provide planning security and measurable impact.

10.question: Which companies benefit most from a Fractional CHRO?
10.answer: Especially SMEs, family businesses, PE portfolio companies and scale-ups in growth, change or transition phases that need strategic HR leadership without hiring a full-time CHRO.

11.question: What is the difference between HR consulting and a Fractional CHRO?
11.answer: HR consulting is often project-based and selective. A Fractional CHRO takes ongoing leadership responsibility, works closely with the executive team and drives priorities, execution and governance holistically.

12.question: How quickly can TaVyro start?
12.answer: Typically on short notice after the initial consultation and scope definition. Engagement starts with a structured onboarding to move priority topics into execution quickly and effectively.

13.question: Is Executive Advisory & Sparring available without a retainer?
13.answer: Yes. Clearly scoped topics can be handled on an hourly basis or in defined packages. For sustainable impact, a continuous setup is often recommended.

14.question: Does TaVyro support reorganization and sensitive people cases?
14.answer: Yes. TaVyro supports reorganization, sensitive people cases and conflict situations with legally sound execution, clear communication and consistent leadership-level implementation.

Erstgespraech.heroText: Let's clarify in 30 minutes whether and how TaVyro can effectively support you as Fractional CHRO / People & Organization Partner – pragmatically in the short term, strategically sustainable.
Erstgespraech.step1: Quick check of your situation (People, Organization, Leadership, HR Systems)
Erstgespraech.step2: Initial hypotheses & next steps – no sales pressure
Erstgespraech.step3: Fit assessment: needs, timing, setup (mandate / interim / advisory)
Erstgespraech.teamsInfo: Online via Microsoft Teams | German/English | Confidentiality guaranteed
Erstgespraech.processStep1Desc: Select an available 30-minute time slot in the booking portal.
Erstgespraech.processStep2Desc: After booking, you will receive a confirmation including the Microsoft Teams meeting link and key details.
Erstgespraech.processStep3Desc: We clarify goals, bottlenecks and priorities. At the end, you receive a clear recommendation on whether a next step makes sense – and which one.
Erstgespraech.processNote: No recording. Content remains confidential. NDA upon request.
Erstgespraech.formIntro: Fill out the short form – we usually respond on the same business day (9am to 5pm). The call takes place via Microsoft Teams; you will receive the link by email.
Erstgespraech.phoneHint: For short-term questions or if you'd like us to reach you faster.
Erstgespraech.dateLabel: Preferred dates for the Teams call
Erstgespraech.dateHint: Available Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm (CET). Please suggest 2-3 alternatives.
Erstgespraech.messagePlaceholder: Feel free to include context, the goal of the conversation or questions you'd like us to prepare.
Erstgespraech.copyToMe: Send me a copy of the request
Erstgespraech.consentText: By submitting, you agree that we may use your information for scheduling. Your data will be treated confidentially.
Erstgespraech.successMessage: Your request has been sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.
Erstgespraech.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly by email.

Datenschutz.subtitle: Privacy Policy (Switzerland) – Summary
Datenschutz.section1Content:
TaVyro GmbH
Albisriederstrasse 248, CH-8047 Zurich, Switzerland
Datenschutz.section2Title: 2. What data we process and why
Datenschutz.section2Intro: When you visit our website or contact us, we process in particular:
Datenschutz.section2TechData: Technical data (e.g. IP address, date/time, pages accessed, browser/OS): for provision, security and stability of the website.
Datenschutz.section2CommData: Communication data (e.g. name, email, content of your inquiry): for processing your request and contacting you.
Datenschutz.section2NoProfiling: We do not use your data for automated individual decisions or profiling that leads to significant impairment.
Datenschutz.section3Content: Our website is hosted by Vercel (Vercel Inc., San Francisco, California, USA). Technical data (in particular IP address and log files) are processed to provide the website securely and reliably. Processing may also take place in the USA and other countries where Vercel or its sub-processors process data.
Datenschutz.section4Content: When you contact us by email or via the contact form, we process your information to handle your inquiry and for any follow-up questions. Disclosure to third parties only occurs when necessary for service provision (e.g. IT service providers/hosting) or when legally required.
Datenschutz.section5Content: We may use cookies that are necessary for the operation of the website. We currently only use visitor statistics (analytics) if activated; we will update this privacy policy when introducing or changing tracking/analytics.
Datenschutz.section6Content: We store personal data only as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as required by legal retention obligations.
Datenschutz.section7Content: Under applicable data protection law, you have the right to information, rectification, deletion/restriction (where permissible) and disclosure/transfer (where legally provided). Please direct inquiries to hello@tavyro.ch. You may also contact the FDPIC.
Datenschutz.section8Content: We take appropriate technical and organizational security measures (including TLS encryption). Absolute protection cannot be guaranteed.

Impressum.subtitle: Information pursuant to Swiss law
Impressum.registerCanton: Registered in the commercial register: Canton of Zurich
Impressum.purposeContent: Fractional CHRO Services, Strategic People Advisory, Executive Advisory & Sparring, HR consulting and organizational development for executive teams, boards and leaders.
Impressum.disclaimerContent: Liability for content: The content of our pages has been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content.
Impressum.disclaimerLinks: Liability for links: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this third-party content.
Impressum.copyrightContent: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to Swiss copyright law.
Impressum.dataProtectionContent: Information on data protection and the use of your data can be found in our Privacy Policy.
Impressum.jurisdictionContent: Swiss law applies exclusively. The place of jurisdiction is Zurich, Switzerland.

meta.titleAbsolute: Fractional CHRO Zurich | Fractional CHRO Switzerland | TaVyro
meta.description: Fractional CHRO in Zurich for SMEs, founders, executive teams and boards. TaVyro provides senior HR leadership, governance and organizational clarity without a full-time CHRO hire.

hero.supporting: TaVyro is a Zurich-based boutique advisory. We provide senior HR and organizational leadership for Swiss SMEs, founders, executive teams and boards—embedded, strategic and practical—without a full-time Chief Human Resources Officer on the payroll.

why.title: Why companies in Zurich and Switzerland choose a Fractional CHRO
why.p1: Zurich sits at the centre of a demanding SME landscape: international competition, tight talent markets, and boards that expect clear governance and execution. Many organizations outgrow informal people practices long before a full-time CHRO is warranted—or they need senior judgment on specific chapters without a permanent seat at the executive table.
why.p2: A Fractional CHRO brings C-level perspective on people, culture and organization. The emphasis is clarity at leadership level, disciplined follow-through and relief for CEOs and executive teams when people topics risk crowding out strategy, customers and operational priorities.

situations.title: Typical situations where a Fractional CHRO adds value

items.0: Rapid growth, new markets or M&A with rising leadership and organizational complexity
items.1: No senior HR leadership in place—or a gap between a capable people/ops team and executive-level expectations
items.2: CEO or CFO carrying people topics that belong at leadership-table level
items.3: Board or owners seeking an independent senior view on culture, risk, succession or organizational health
items.4: Transformation, restructuring or friction in the leadership team that needs calm, experienced judgment
items.5: Stronger governance, compliance and implementation discipline—without committing to a permanent executive hire

what.title: What TaVyro actually does
what.intro: TaVyro works as TaVyro—with clear accountability to your executive team, not as a rotating cast of junior consultants. Typical scope includes:

items.0: People strategy aligned with business priorities and board expectations
items.1: Organizational design: roles, structure, leadership cadence and decision rights
items.2: Executive and leadership sparring—discreet, direct, suited to Swiss SMEs
items.3: HR governance, employment-law-aware judgment and escalation support where needed
items.4: Executive-level HR decision support (succession thinking, compensation frameworks, sensitive cases)
items.5: Transformation and implementation support—selective hands-on work where execution must land, not slide decks without ownership

what.outro: We combine direction with pragmatic execution. Where digital tools or analytics add decision quality, we use them proportionately—without turning people leadership into a technology project.

different.title: Why TaVyro is different
different.intro: TaVyro is not classic HR consulting, staff augmentation, or a temporary vacancy filler. The model is a deeply embedded senior partner for a defined mandate, with scalable intensity and continuity of judgment.

vsConsultants.title: Versus HR consultants
vsConsultants.body: Consulting often optimizes for deliverables and project phases. TaVyro optimizes for leadership outcomes: prioritization with the executive team, governance that holds under pressure, and implementation that your organization can run after the mandate evolves.

vsInterim.title: Versus interim HR managers
vsInterim.body: Interim roles frequently focus on stabilizing operations or filling a seat. TaVyro’s Fractional CHRO work is strategic and relational at executive level—sparring, design and decision support—while remaining practical about what must be executed now.

vsFullTime.title: Versus a full-time CHRO hire
vsFullTime.body: A permanent CHRO is the right answer for some scale and complexity profiles. Where timing, cost or organizational maturity do not justify a full-time role, a fractional model provides senior coverage with a footprint that matches the real need.

vsLargeFirms.title: Versus large consulting firms with rotating teams
vsLargeFirms.body: You work with TaVyro as a boutique: consistent senior contact, discreet handling of sensitive topics, and advice shaped for Swiss SMEs—not a parade of unfamiliar faces or generic playbooks.

mandate.title: How a mandate typically works
mandate.p1: We start from your situation and outcomes—not a fixed catalogue. Engagement is usually part-time and integrated over weeks and months: a steady cadence with the CEO and executive team, explicit priorities, and hands-on support where the bottleneck sits.
mandate.p2: Intensity scales with need—sharper at the front of a transformation, lighter during stabilization. The aim is continuity of judgment and relationship rather than a sequence of disconnected interventions.

local.title: Zurich and Switzerland
local.p1: TaVyro is based in Zurich and works with SMEs, founders, executive teams and boards across Switzerland. Collaboration is often hybrid; substance is always grounded in local practice, language and governance expectations.
local.p2: For the Switzerland-wide view in German, or to compare scope, use the link below. The English overview of Fractional CHRO across Switzerland is on a separate page.

0.a: A Fractional CHRO provides part-time, executive-level HR and organizational leadership—embedded with the CEO and leadership team—without a full-time Chief Human Resources Officer on payroll. The role combines direction, governance and pragmatic implementation where it matters.

1.q: Is a Fractional CHRO suitable for SMEs?
1.a: Yes. Swiss SMEs often reach a point where people, culture and organization become strategic constraints, yet a full-time CHRO is premature or uneconomical. A fractional model matches seniority to the real footprint of the need.

2.q: How is a Fractional CHRO different from an interim HR leader?
2.a: Interim assignments often emphasize operational continuity or filling a vacancy. Fractional CHRO work at TaVyro emphasizes executive sparring, organizational clarity, governance and selective implementation—aligned with the leadership table rather than only the HR inbox.

3.q: When does a company need a Fractional CHRO?
3.a: Typical triggers include rapid growth, transformation, leadership transitions, board-level questions on culture or risk, overload of people topics on the CEO agenda, or the need to professionalize HR governance without an immediate permanent hire.

4.q: Can a Fractional CHRO support the CEO and executive team?
4.a: That is the core of the model. TaVyro works with the executive team on prioritization, difficult decisions and alignment—discreetly and with a bias for clarity, accountability and execution.

5.q: Do you work only in Zurich or across Switzerland?
5.a: TaVyro is based in Zurich and serves clients across Switzerland. Meetings and collaboration are structured pragmatically—on-site when valuable, remote when efficient—always with attention to Swiss context.

6.q: Is TaVyro a personal brand or a firm?
6.a: TaVyro is the commercial brand and contracting party. Senior expertise sits behind TaVyro; accountability to clients is with the advisory, not as a standalone personal profile page.

7.q: How do confidentiality and sensitive topics work?
7.a: Executive-level people topics require discretion. Mandates are structured with clear boundaries, professional confidentiality and pragmatic escalation paths appropriate to the situation and stakeholders involved.

final.title: A calm next step
final.body: If the situations above resonate, an initial conversation is the simplest way to clarify fit, timing and scope. No hype—just a focused assessment of whether TaVyro can add value in your context.
